violations.description: HANDWASHING LAVATORIES AND SUPPLIES (3 pts): The hand washing lavatory near grill area noted is being used for other than hand-washing. Utensils noted in sink only to be used for hand-washing.
CONTAMINATION DURING STORAGE (2 pts): Large (white) food storage bins noted not properly labeled. Be sure to place all boxes of food off floor inside walkin coolers and freezers.
TEMPERATURE MEASURING DEVICES (1 pts): Small reachin cooler in waitress station used to store milk and dairy noted with no thermometer inside.
NON FOOD CONTACT SURFACES - DESIGN (1 pts): Wire-type shelving located inside walkiin cooler noted not in good repair.
REFUSE STORAGE (1 pts): Exterior garbage containers noted not covered with tight fitting lids. (lids are up)
FLOORS WALLS CEILINGS (1 pts): Floor walls and ceiling in food prep ware-washing and food storage areas noted in need of ceaning and repairs.
NON FOOD CONTACT SURFACES - CLEAN (1 pts): Equipment exteriors including door handles shelving noted in need of routine cleaning. Roll-cart needs cleaning.

HANDWASHING LAVATORIES AND SUPPLIES (3 pts): The hand washing lavatory in warfe-washing area noted with no hot water provided. This sink was also blocked with a cart in front needs to be easily accessible at all times during operation. Disposable towels to be provided at all handsinks. (2 are empty)
FOOD CONTACT SURFACES - CLEAN (2 pts): Reachin cooler interiors noted in of cleaning ( bottom-insides)
NON FOOD CONTACT SURFACES - CLEAN (1 pts): Equipment exteriors noted in need of routine cleaning including door handles and top of oven.
NON FOOD CONTACT SURFACES - DESIGN (1 pts): Walkin cooler shelving noted not in good repair.

FLOORS WALLS CEILINGS (1 pts): Floors walls and ceiling throughout kitchen ware-washing food storage area and inside walkin coolers and freezers need repairs and routine cleaning. Floor inside walkin freezers need cleaning. Dishwashing stainless steel needs recaulk to wall.
REFUSE STORAGE (1 pts): Exterior garbage container noted not covered with tight fitting lids. ( lids are up )
SINGLE - USE/SINGLE - SERVICE ARTICLES (1 pts): Single service spoons noted being on self-service line with lip contact surfaces unprotected.
